summary: The story revolves around a character named MASTER who claims to be the 'King of Beasts' and offers to take in a young boy as his disciple if he can defeat a dire wolf. The boy, seemingly familiar with the concept of the Phantom Eye, is hesitant at first but eventually agrees to join MASTER. They then visit LUYE HALL, an ancient temple filled with mysterious energy, where they discuss the history and origins of the Luye. MASTER shares his past experiences and reveals that he has been seeking revenge against a powerful demon for nearly 4,000 years.
key_moments: MASTER offers to take in the boy as his disciple
The visit to LUYE HALL and discussion about its history
MASTER reveals his past experiences and motivations
